name: Compare neck injury workers comp vs personal injury lawsuit at work?
description: Comp no-fault quicker; lawsuit for others liable.

mainEntity.name: Compare neck injury workers comp vs personal injury lawsuit at work?

acceptedAnswer.text: Comp no-fault quicker; lawsuit for others liable.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Workers' comp limits benefits but no fault proof; lawsuits rare as exclusive remedy unless third-party.** Comp faster, no pain/suffering.[6] Key factors: Sue equipment maker if defective; comp caps at disability %. Choose based on negligence. Comp first always.
